scenario.name: RTP Echo pause / start test UAS
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 183 Session Progress [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Require: 100rel P-Asserted-Identity: <sip:3603388550@nextiva.com;user=phone> Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=sendrecv a=maxptime:20

UPDATE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$us] To: [$them] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 3 UPDATE Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/participant-info+xml Content-Length:[len]
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <conference-info> <moderator display = "8881100020" >sip:8881100020@sbcsv.com</moderator> <user display = "8881100021, partha" >sip:8881100021@sbcsv.com</user> <user display = "8881100022, partha" >sip:8881100022@sbcsv.com</user> <party-count> 3 </party-count> </conference-info>

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_Record-Route:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 8 0 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$us] To: [$them] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$us] To: [$them] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 ACK Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

BYE [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] From: [$us] To: [$them] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: [cseq] BYE Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port] Content-Length: 0
